findings.message: Required prop 'description' is not present on 'alert-dialog' itself.
findings.rationale: title, description, and actionLabel are required by the component API (aria-labelledby / aria-describedby wiring), and "describe what will happen in the description so the user knows the consequences before confirming". The schema does not check prop presence; this rule does — Astryx AlertDialog docs, v0.1.4

findings.message: Required prop 'actionLabel' is not present on 'alert-dialog' itself.
findings.rationale: title, description, and actionLabel are required by the component API (aria-labelledby / aria-describedby wiring), and "describe what will happen in the description so the user knows the consequences before confirming".
